headline: This build pushes Ryokoplan further toward a real product surface by tightening top-bar chrome, control heights, button scale, card media ratios, search and filter rows, sticky actions, and the mobile dock into a more mature, production-grade editorial UI across web and mobile.
notes: Refines the visual system behind top-bar chrome, language controls, chips, buttons, and section headers so the interface reads less like a prototype with mixed control sizes and more like one coherent editorial product.

Rebalances hero spacing, card image ratios, card body cadence, search and filter toolbars, and form inputs so key surfaces feel calmer, denser in the right places, and more intentional on both mobile and desktop.
Softens sticky and dock surfaces while keeping current launch/support behavior intact, reducing visual noise and making everyday interactions feel closer to a production release.
